item.title: US justice department drops probe into Fed chairman Jerome Powell
item.description: President Donald Trump had accused Powell of improper cost overruns in renovating the Fed's building.

item.title: Zack Polanski calls for Trump to be 'kicked out' of his Scottish golf courses
item.description: Trump International responded calling the Greens leader an "imbecile" after he shared his personal opinion on the Holyrood campaign trail.

item.title: Ex-Channel 5 newsreader withdraws claims against Dan Walker
item.description: Dan Walker's employers ITN and Channel 5 agreed to pay Claudia-Liza Vanderpuije an undisclosed amount, with no admission of liability.

item.title: 'My living nightmare': Rob Reiner's son on how he found out parents were dead
item.description: The actor says the grief of his parents' brutal deaths and the arrest of his own brother left him in a "trance".

item.title: No 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
item.description: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.
